subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down by the Wronged One unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, that the utterance of the All-Merciful may draw him nigh unto the station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم لیقربه بیان الرحمن الی مقام
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @Word of God and human limitations, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
